# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      # Build artifacts here
      - name: Build Artifacts
        run: ...

      - name: Upload Artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: build/

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Download Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts

      # Execute deployment scripts here
      - name: Deploy
        run: ...
